Subject:
// FIRM ENQUIRY // ACCT : VULCAN COMMODITIES // COKING COAL, 75,000 MT +/-10% OO ( 2 OR 3 GRADES ) // NACALA - VIZAG VPT // LAYCAN : 21 - 30 DEC\'25
Good Day !
KIND ATTN : CHARTERING DESK
//
Please submit your best offer with vessel itinerary and stowage plan as per below summary and attached full terms
within 1200 hrs UAE time by Friday 5th Dec 2025.
Note:
a) Vessel to conform to Nacala port requirements and be
compatible for discharging in Haldia. GHG rating of the vessel to be A / B /  C
b) In case of offers basis TBN, the vessel nomination is to be done by 12th Dec\'25.
c) Laytime reversible between discharge ports.
d) Charterer\'s option for alternative discharge ports in East Coast India with freight rate to be calculated on open book basis same TC equivalent without repositioning bonus.
e) Notwithstanding anything agreed elsewhere in CP / Fixture Note, in case Owners fail to nominate a vessel for arrival within laycan OR if the nominated vessel fails to arrive at Nacala within the laycan, Charterers have the right to book an alternate vessel from market. Any freight differential paid for such a market vessel will have to be borne by the Owners.
f) Vessel with age more than 20 years are not acceptable
g) Vessel must have Rightship Ratings 3 & above
h) Force Majeure Clause in the draft CP has been amended and the same would be applicable for this fixture
i) Draft surveys, shifting time from waiting anchorage to discharging area and shifting between discharge ports will be excluded from Laytime.
Tidal risks and waiting for the tide
are on owners\' accounts.
j) Notice of Readiness (NOR) at Discharging Ports shall be presented at any time of the day SSHINC irrespective of official hours, by the vessel after arrival at discharge port, whether in berth or not, whether in free pratique or not, whether customs cleared or not, provided the vessel is ready in all respects to discharge.
k) Vessel needs to be compatible for calling Haldia and GHG rating needs to be A/B/C.
ACCT : VULCAN COMMODITIES
